name: This is my number one enemy...
description:
Delayed because I have a bone splitting headache, but if you see this then I either A: pulled through or B: slept it off.

(Spoiler it’s both A and B I guess idk how ts works)

I also had nineteen math assignments due, so I was working on that before Whitebeard decided to drive his bisento into my fucking skull..

I’m tired rn, so I’m sorry if it’s so ass 😭💔

I’ll do a short intro because I want it to be simple.
creator: AeroNotHere
